---
title: "‘Sweet yet Prickly Leaves: June’. Unsigned."
---

## ‘Sweet yet Prickly Leaves: June’. Unsigned.

**By Charlotte Mary Yonge**

**Published:** 1901
**Genre:** Non-fiction
**Format:** Article in Journal

**Publisher:** <i>Friendly Leaves</i> (July 1901) 242-3

### Notes

This series, \'Leaves for the Months\', is identified as by CMY in the obituary in <i>Friendly Leaves</i>, April 1901. A footnote to this paper says ‘This is the last paper Miss Yonge wrote for us.’

---

[← Back to all letters](../../letters.html)
